ddls:
CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing channel (e.g., Direct, Email, Organic Search) */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of marketing channel (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "channel_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the channel */,
  "channel_status" TEXT /* Active or inactive status of the channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the channel was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the channel was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the client operates in */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the client */,
  "client_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the client */,
  "client_status" TEXT /* Active or inactive status of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the website belongs to */,
  "website_name" TEXT /* Name of the website */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the website */,
  "website_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the website */,
  "website_status" TEXT /* Active or inactive status of the website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the website was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the website was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_websites_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the goal belongs to */,
  "goal_name" TEXT /* Name of the goal */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of goal (e.g., conversion, engagement) */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the goal */,
  "goal_status" TEXT /* Active or inactive status of the goal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the goal was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the goal was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal the conversion belongs to */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date the conversion occurred */,
  "conversion_value" REAL /* Value of the conversion */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website where the conversion occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the conversion */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the conversion */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the conversion occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversions_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversions_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES goals ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channel_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel the session belongs to */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the session belongs to */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date the session occurred */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the session */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the session */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the session occurred */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Active or inactive status of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_sessions_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_sessions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_sessions_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channel_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel the goal belongs to */,
  "goal_conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the goal for the channel */,
  "goal_completions" INTEGER /* Number of goal completions for the channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the goal was associated with the channel */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the goal association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id", "channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channel_traffic" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic entry */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel the traffic belongs to */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the traffic belongs to */,
  "traffic_date" TEXT /* Date the traffic occurred */,
  "traffic_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of traffic for the channel */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the traffic */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the traffic */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the traffic occurred */,
  "traffic_status" TEXT /* Active or inactive status of the traffic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_traffic_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_traffic_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_traffic_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_traffic_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the device belongs to */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used on the device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who used the device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES channel_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the location belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed from the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES channel_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "value_attribution" (
  "attribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribution entry */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel the attribution belongs to */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal the attribution belongs to */,
  "attribution_value" REAL /* Value attributed to the channel for the goal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attribution was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attribution was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_value_attribution_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_value_attribution_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES goals ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Active or inactive status of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Active or inactive status of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the data belongs to */,
  "data" TEXT /* Actual data for the report */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., channel, goal) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
